hero.title: Learn Spanish the
hero.description: Book your classes, track your progress, and connect with native Colombian teachers. The all-in-one platform for your Spanish learning journey.

features.title: Everything you need in one place
features.subtitle: Powerful tools designed for modern educational management

users.title: Easy Registration
users.description: Your account is ready in minutes. Access your dashboard to see your classes and progress.

bookings.title: Smart Booking
bookings.description: See your teacher's real availability and book classes that fit your schedule.

packages.title: Flexible Packages
packages.description: Choose from Open Group, Closed Group, or Private classes. 1 to 6 weeks with progressive discounts.

payments.title: Secure Payments
payments.description: Pay with bank transfer, credit card, or cash. Your booking is confirmed once payment is approved.

rooms.title: In-Person & Virtual
rooms.description: Learn in our classrooms in Medellín or join virtual classes from anywhere in the world.

availability.title: Real-Time Schedule
availability.description: Check your upcoming classes, hours remaining, and teacher availability at any time.

howItWorks.title: How does it work?
howItWorks.subtitle: Four simple steps to start your Spanish learning journey

1.title: Create your account
1.description: Your teacher will register you in the platform.

2.title: Choose your package
2.description: Pick the class type and duration that fits your goals: Open Group, Closed Group, or Private.

3.title: Book your classes
3.description: Select your teacher, schedule, and preferred modality — in-person or virtual.

4.title: Start learning
4.description: Attend your classes, track your hours, and enjoy learning Spanish in Medellín.

benefits.title: Why choose Valley Spanish School?
benefits.subtitle: The best way to learn Spanish in Medellín
items: Native Colombian teachers with years of experience
Flexible scheduling: in-person and virtual classes
Track your progress and class hours in real-time
Located in the heart of Medellín

footer.description: Learn Spanish in Medellín with native Colombian teachers. In-person and virtual classes for all levels.
